heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 20324 Authorization of appropriations
notes: References in TextThe Juvenile Justice and Delinquency Prevention Act of 1974, referred to in subsec. (b), is , , . Title II of the Act was classified principally to subchapter II (§ 5611 et seq.) of chapter 72 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification as subchapter II (§ 11111 et seq.) of chapter 111 of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 93–41588 Stat. 1109Sept. 7, 1974

Dissemination of Information, , , provided that:Pub. L. 106–386, div. B, title III, § 1302(d)114 Stat. 1511Oct. 28, 2000“The Attorney General shall—“(1)annually compile and disseminate information (including through electronic publication) about the use of amounts expended and the projects funded under section 218(a) [now 219(a)] of the Victims of Child Abuse Act of 1990 () [now ], section 224(a) of the Victims of Child Abuse Act of 1990 () [now ], and section 1007(a)(7) [1001(a)(7)] of title I of the Omnibus Crime Control and Safe Streets Act of 1968 () [now ], including any evaluations of the projects and information to enable replication and adoption of the strategies identified in the projects; and42 U.S.C. 13014(a)34 U.S.C. 20324(a)42 U.S.C. 13024(a)34 U.S.C. 20334(a)42 U.S.C. 3793(a)(7)34 U.S.C. 10261(a)(7)“(2)focus dissemination of the information described in paragraph (1) toward community-based programs, including domestic violence and sexual assault programs.”[For definitions of terms used in , set out above, see , set out as a note under .]section 1302(d)(2) of Pub. children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subchapter $12,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2023 through 2027.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: b Limitation
children.text: No funds are authorized to be appropriated for a fiscal year to carry out this subchapter unless the aggregate amount appropriated to carry out title II of the Juvenile Justice and Delinquency Prevention Act of 1974 ( et seq.) for such fiscal year is not less than the aggregate amount appropriated to carry out such title for the preceding fiscal year.42 U.S.C. 56111See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Prohibition on lobbying
children.label: c Prohibition on lobbying
children.text: No funds authorized under this subchapter may be used for lobbying activities in contravention of OMB Circular No. A–122.
